description_long: This is a casual open-toe sandal featuring two wide straps across the top of the foot, one in glossy navy blue and the other in matte light gray. The sandal has a slingback heel strap with a metallic button detail on the side, providing additional support and style. The footbed is contoured and beige, designed to cradle the foot comfortably, while the outsole is white with a wavy tread for grip. The materials appear to be a combination of synthetic leather for the straps, foam for the footbed, and rubber for the sole. The overall design is modern and practical, suitable for everyday urban wear. The sandal is clean and shows no visible signs of wear or branding.
description: A modern open-toe sandal with navy blue and light gray straps, a beige contoured footbed, and a white wavy rubber sole. Features a slingback heel strap with a metallic button accent.
description_view_0: Side view showing the navy blue and gray straps, slingback heel strap with metallic button, and the wavy white sole.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the open-toe design, the arrangement of the two straps, and the contoured beige footbed.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the same strap configuration and heel support, with clear visibility of the sole's thickness.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the heel strap and the open back, with the footbed and strap interiors partially visible.
